meta.title: Welcome to Marine Corps Boot Camp at Parris Island
meta.description:
Sand fleas, fire ants, and temperatures soaring into the 100-degree Fahrenheit mark with what feels like 100 percent humidity, is where many Marines begin their career in the Marine Corps. Welcome to MCRD Parris Island,  your future starts here.

U.S. Marine Corps video by Lance Cpl. Christopher McMurry
